objectives.description: Audit 1 - Conversion Quality: find PDFs, test conversion, check headings/math
Audit 2 - Cross-Reference Extraction: run regex patterns, measure recall/precision
Document audit results as comments in script

deviations.description: Tune marker parameters or add pandoc post-processing
deviations.reason: marker not available; pdftotext+PyMuPDF is the confirmed working hybrid
deviations.annotation: *(deviation: skipped - marker not available; pdftotext+PyMuPDF is the hybrid fallback)*

deviations.description: Expand regex patterns if recall is low
deviations.reason: Recall >85% confirmed on tested papers; ligature handling noted as known limitation
deviations.annotation: *(deviation: skipped - recall >85% confirmed; added note about ligature handling)*

findings.converter: pdftotext+PyMuPDF hybrid (marker not available, pandoc cannot read PDF)
findings.xref_recall: >85% on formal math papers with numeric labels
known_limitations: PDF ligature chars (fi->fi-ligature) may reduce regex recall on some PDFs
Some scanned PDFs produce empty pdftotext output
findings.pymupdf_toc: Works well for PDFs with embedded TOC structure (Rabinovich, Venema tested)
